# System Identifiers

Use this reference to choose what evidence to capture for a GT40 or GT40-style car before treating a component as identified.

## Identity and chassis

- Chassis plate, tub stampings, title, registry, restoration records.
- Tub material, seams, repairs, corrosion, suspension pickup condition.
- Body clip construction, hinges, latches, duct openings, glazing, door hardware.

## Engine and induction

- Block casting number, date code, main-cap arrangement, bore, stroke, crank, rods, pistons.
- Cylinder-head casting marks, serials, chamber shape, valve sizes, plug angle, port shape, repair history.
- Cam card, rocker ratio, pushrod length, spring installed height, retainer and lock type.
- Carburetor model and serials, choke size, venturis, jets, emulsion tubes, linkage, manifold marks.
- Distributor make, curve, ignition box, coil, plug type, tach drive.
- Header pattern, collector size, heat shielding, cracks, coating or wrap.

## Fuel, oil, and cooling

- Tank or cell maker, date, foam, filler, cap, vent valves, drains, cockpit/firewall isolation.
- Pump, regulator, filters, hose spec/date, hardline routing, gauge location.
- Wet-sump or dry-sump layout, pump, tank/sump, cooler, thermostat, filter, relief valve, line size, breather/catch tank.
- Radiator, pump, fan, cap pressure, thermostat/restrictor, bleed points, hose date.

## Driveline

- Clutch disc diameter and spline, cover, flywheel, release bearing, slave, master, pedal ratio.
- Transaxle manufacturer plate, model, serial, case marks, ratios, LSD type, final drive, cooler or vent.
- Halfshaft/CV/donut type, fasteners, safety wire, boots, heat shields, plunge, angularity.

## Suspension and steering

- Pickup points, arm construction, upright marks, spring rates, damper make, anti-roll bar size, shim stacks.
- Link lengths, rod ends, bushings, fastener locking, crack evidence.
- Rack make/ratio, column joints, supports, steering-wheel hub, quick release, stops.

## Brakes, wheels, and tires

- Master-cylinder sizes, balance bar or proportioning valve, line routing, hose dates, fluid, residual valves.
- Caliper make, piston sizes, disc diameter/thickness, pad compound, ducting, hardware.
- Wheel make, size, offset, peg drive, hub marks, center-lock nut thread direction, retainers.
- Tire make/model/size, date code, construction, tube status, valve, intended use.

## Electrical and instruments

- Harness layout, fuse/relay map, ground points, connectors, insulation condition.
- Battery type/location/enclosure, alternator/generator, starter, master switch, cable routing.
- Gauge make/range, sender part number, capillary lines, warning lamps, switch labels.

## Safety

- Belt date/spec, extinguisher/fire-system date, roll-over protection, seat mounts, firewall, floor, tank isolation.
